description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F

You make a touch attack against a target bound by the Keiyaku Fuuin technique, a target who has bound a creature using said technique, or against a creature who has the Blood Pact feat. The subject's Keiyaku Fuuin is broken, and any creature bound by it is freed from its effects. If the target has the Blood Pact feat, it becomes unable to summon creatures from its blood pact(s) for 1d4 hours, and any creatures they have summoned from their blood pact(s) must make a Will save or be banished.

Alternatively, you can use this technique on an object with a seal made by the Fuinjutsu: Shuntori Fuin technique to break the seal. The object can make its save as though it was held by the creature that created said seal. This technique cannot be used on the same target more than once per day.
